blocks.text: Reitan Storms Augusta: Norway's Sunday Could Be Historic

Kristoffer Reitan has been the sensation of Augusta — 'gåsehud', say the experts. McIlroy leads at -12, but Sunday's final round is unwritten. Meanwhile Wærenskjold cobble-hunts at Paris-Roubaix and Ruud stalks the Monte-Carlo clay.
⛳ Masters Tournament final round — McIlroy leads at -12, Reitan and Hovland charging
🏅 Paris-Roubaix 2026 — Wærenskjold and Abrahamsen tackle cycling's Hell of the North
🎾 Monte-Carlo Masters — Ruud opens on clay, eyeing a title run before Roland Garros
